# AI Dev Tycoon - Documentation Index

> This index lists documentation files in the project to help AI agents navigate context, architecture, and current execution plans.

## Main Entry Point
- [README.md](file:///Users/andriinepodymka/Desktop/AIDevTyccon/ai-dev-tycoon/README.md): High-level project summary, tech stack, getting started, branch workflow, and agent instructions.

## Core Agent Documentation
- [.agents/AGENTS.md](file:///Users/andriinepodymka/Desktop/AIDevTyccon/ai-dev-tycoon/.agents/AGENTS.md): Coding guidelines, Definition of Done, and memory routines for agents.
- [memory-bank/activeContext.md](file:///Users/andriinepodymka/Desktop/AIDevTyccon/ai-dev-tycoon/memory-bank/activeContext.md): Active goals, current task status, and planned next steps.
- [memory-bank/systemPatterns.md](file:///Users/andriinepodymka/Desktop/AIDevTyccon/ai-dev-tycoon/memory-bank/systemPatterns.md): System architecture, folder structure, coding conventions, and helper functions.
- [memory-bank/progress.md](file:///Users/andriinepodymka/Desktop/AIDevTyccon/ai-dev-tycoon/memory-bank/progress.md): Milestone progress tracking, completed sprint items, and backlog.

## Project Guidelines & Requirements
- [CONTRIBUTING.md](file:///Users/andriinepodymka/Desktop/AIDevTyccon/ai-dev-tycoon/CONTRIBUTING.md): Guidelines for human and AI contributions, Git workflow.
- [docs/backlog.md](file:///Users/andriinepodymka/Desktop/AIDevTyccon/ai-dev-tycoon/docs/backlog.md): Project backlog containing blockers, future features, spikes, and reminders.
- [docs/task-template.md](file:///Users/andriinepodymka/Desktop/AIDevTyccon/ai-dev-tycoon/docs/task-template.md): Reusable blueprint for defining tasks for AI coding agents.
- [TASK.md](file:///Users/andriinepodymka/Desktop/AIDevTyccon/ai-dev-tycoon/TASK.md): Initial prototype implementation steps.
- [docs/phase-2-core-loop-spec.md](file:///Users/andriinepodymka/Desktop/AIDevTyccon/ai-dev-tycoon/docs/phase-2-core-loop-spec.md): Template for the Phase 2 core gameplay loop specification.
- [docs/dev-architecture.md](file:///Users/andriinepodymka/Desktop/AIDevTyccon/ai-dev-tycoon/docs/dev-architecture.md): Architectural boundaries, game logic separations, and directory patterns.
- [.github/pull_request_template.md](file:///Users/andriinepodymka/Desktop/AIDevTyccon/ai-dev-tycoon/.github/pull_request_template.md): PR submission template and checklist.
